{{Stub}}
'''Gear Cards''' are a special type of card introduced in the [[Doomspire Act 1: Crossroads|Doomspire]] packs. Gears are attached to a [[Target|target]] fighter, giving them stat buffs or nerfs, and special effects. Gears are neither [[Action And Terrain Cards|Actions or Terrain]] cards, casting a gear would activate a different trigger. Gears can be attached to fighters through effects other than simply casting them, such as [[Justice Fanatics]], which attaches a [[Justice Merchandise]] to a [[Target|target]] fighter whenever an action or gear card targets it. Of course, gears can also be destroyed, such as through [[Playtime's Over]] If you're looking for the category, it's [[:Category:Gears|here]] {{clear}}
